lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Spare some change guv?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Charles. Charles E. Trampin' at your service. Now, about that change you were going to give me...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I haven't got any.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Thanks anyway.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Go get a job!

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: You startin? I hope your nose falls off!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok. Here you go.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Hey, thanks a lot!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No problem.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So...don't I get some sort of quest hint or something now?

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Huh? What do you mean? That wasn't why I asked you for money.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: I just need to eat...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh wait. I haven't got any, sorry.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Thanks anyway.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there anything down this alleyway?

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Funny you should mention that...there is actually.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: The ruthless and notorious criminal gang known as the Black Arm Gang have their headquarters down there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the warning!

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Don't worry about it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you think they would let me join?

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: You never know. You'll find a lady down there called Katrine. Speak to her.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: But don't upset her, she's pretty dangerous.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: I was under the impression you were already a member...

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: No. You're a collaborator with the Phoenix Gang. There's no way they'll let you join now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How did YOU know I was in the Phoenix Gang?

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: In my current profession I spend a lot of time on the streets and you hear these sorta things sometimes

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Any ideas how I could get in there then?

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Hmmm. I dunno.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Your best bet would probably be to find someone else... Someone who ISN'T a member of the Phoenix Gang, and get them to infiltrate the ranks of the Black Arm Gang for you.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: If you find someone like that, tell 'em to come to me first.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok. Good plan!

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: I'm not just a pretty face!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Like who?

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: There's plenty of other adventurers about besides yourself. I'm sure if you asked one of them nicely they would help you.

sections.title: When on one of Charlie's clues

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Please [, sir/, madam], can you help me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: I really need a cooked trout.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: I really need a cooked pike.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: I really need a raw herring

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: I really need a raw trout.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: I really need some leather chaps.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: I really need a leather body.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: I really need an iron dagger.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: I really need a piece of iron ore.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure, I'll be glad to help a person in need.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Thank you so much [sir/madam].
